questions.q: In April 2026, a gas station clerk in which U.S. state saved a teenager from an alleged kidnapper after she mouthed the word 'help'?
Protesters attempting to storm a beagle breeding and research facility were met with rubber bullets and pepper spray in which U.S. state?
Two U.S. Army soldiers were seriously injured during a training mission when they were attacked by a bear in what state?
A Los Angeles judge ruled in April 2026 that actor Alec Baldwin must face a civil trial over alleged negligence regarding what incident?
options: A fatal car crash in Malibu
An assault on a paparazzi photographer
A boating collision in New York

questions.q: In mid-April 2026, a severe weather system bringing powerful winds and reported tornadoes caused heavy damage but no deaths in which U.S. region?
